name: Couples Pack
blackCards: The worst date night activity is ____.
The couple everyone avoids always brings up ____.
The anniversary dinner was ruined by ____.
The worst thing to find in your partner’s phone is ____.
The most romantic thing my partner ever did was ____.
whiteCards: Reading old texts while emotionally unstable
Pretending not to check their location
A shared calendar full of resentment
Arguing over where to eat for two hours
A matching pajama photo nobody asked for
Keeping score since 2017
A romantic weekend at a budget motel
Saying ‘I’m fine’ with dangerous eye contact
A passive-aggressive goodnight text
The silent treatment with snacks

Fighting over thermostat settings
An anniversary gift from the gas station
Joint bank account trauma
A relationship powered by takeout
A love note written during an argument
Accidentally liking an ex’s photo
A shared Netflix profile full of betrayal
A date night ruined by bad parking
Saying sorry just to end the conversation
